concerns.text: The 'Assumptions' section contains a surviving '[NEEDS CLARIFICATION]' marker: 'if a specific variable is missing, a [NEEDS CLARIFICATION] will be raised'. Per the kickback reason, converged specs must not carry this marker. The assumption must be resolved to a concrete fallback strategy (e.g., 'If a variable is missing, the system logs a warning and proceeds with a reduced feature set') or removed.
